title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 527.230 - Copy to be recorded, where — may be read in evidence
text:
527.230.  Copy to be recorded, where — may be read in evidence. — A certified copy of any decree entered in pursuance of sections 527.190 to 527.250 shall be recorded in the office of the recorder or register of deeds of the said county where the lands are situate, and a certified copy of said decree, or of the record thereof, may be read as evidence in all courts and judicial proceedings in this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 1693) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1529; 1919 § 1979; 1909 § 2543
